# Fjell OS — MMIO Ordering Audit v0.12

*Generated by `cargo run -p fjell-mmio-audit -- --workspace . --check`*
*RFC-v0.12-004. Single-hart RISC-V (RVWMO) assumed.*

## Summary

| Metric | Value |
|--------|-------|
| Total MMIO sites | 23 |
| Annotated | 23 |
| Missing annotation | 0 |
| Invalid annotation | 0 |
| Gate result | **PASS** |

## Site inventory

### `crates/fjell-kernel/src/arch/riscv64/timer.rs`

| Line | Pattern | Classification | Justification |
|------|---------|----------------|---------------|
| 27 | `read_volatile (CLINT_MTIME)` | `status_read` | Reading CLINT mtime counter; acquire ordering needed before subsequent branch |
| 39 | `write_volatile (CLINT_MTIMECMP0)` | `device_kick` | Setting next timer deadline; release ordering ensures prior state is visible |

### `crates/fjell-kernel/src/uart.rs`

| Line | Pattern | Classification | Justification |
|------|---------|----------------|---------------|
| 50 | `write_volatile (UART_LCR)` | `device_setup` | Line control register init; UART not yet receiving — no ordering constraint |
| 52 | `write_volatile (UART_FCR)` | `device_setup` | FIFO enable; UART init — no ordering constraint |
| 69 | `write_volatile (UART_THR)` | `device_kick` | Transmit byte; previous data must be visible |

### `crates/fjell-kernel/src/trap/syscall.rs`

| Line | Pattern | Classification | Justification |
|------|---------|----------------|---------------|
| 133 | `write_volatile (UART_BASE)` | `device_kick` | Debug byte output; same as uart.rs putc |

### `crates/fjell-svc-fault/src/main.rs`

| Line | Pattern | Classification | Justification |
|------|---------|----------------|---------------|
| 20 | `read_volatile (0)` | `poll` | Intentional null-pointer fault for negative test; no MMIO device |

### `crates/fjell-neg-test/src/main.rs`

| Line | Pattern | Classification | Justification |
|------|---------|----------------|---------------|
| 203 | `read_volatile (user_va)` | `poll` | Reads revoked DMA PA to verify zero-fill; test-only path |

### `crates/fjell-storaged/src/main.rs`

| Line | Pattern | Classification | Justification |
|------|---------|----------------|---------------|
| 97 | `read_volatile (rd32)` | `status_read` | Read virtio MMIO register; acquire fence needed before branch on result |
| 103 | `write_volatile (wr32)` | `device_kick` | Write virtio MMIO register; release fence needed after queue prep |
| 112–115 | `write_volatile (write_desc)` | `descriptor_publish` | Virtio descriptor fields (addr, len, flags, next); must precede fence+avail update |
| 125 | `read_volatile (avail_push idx)` | `descriptor_publish` | Read avail ring idx; part of avail ring publish sequence |
| 127 | `write_volatile (avail_push slot)` | `descriptor_publish` | Write avail ring slot; after `fence rw,w` in avail_push |
| 129 | `write_volatile (avail_push advance)` | `descriptor_publish` | Advance avail idx; final step before device kick |
| 137 | `read_volatile (used_idx)` | `status_read` | Read used ring idx to poll completion |
| 145–148 | `write_volatile (do_io header)` | `descriptor_publish` | virtio_blk_req header fields (type, reserved, lba, status); before fence |
| 182 | `read_volatile (do_io status)` | `status_read` | Read completion status byte after polling |

## Single-hart restriction

This audit assumes single-hart execution. Multi-hart introduces
inter-hart ordering on shared MMIO regions; deferred to a post-v1.0 RFC
if SMP support is pursued.

## Next steps

1. Hardware validation on VisionFive 2 silicon (RFC-v0.12-002 §6).
2. Any ordering regression discovered on real hardware → file against this RFC.
3. Multi-hart audit if SMP is pursued post-v1.0.
